title: Nototriche pearcei
taxonomy: Nototriche pearcei is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to Peru. The classification of Nototriche pearcei places it within the genus Nototriche, which is part of the subfamily Malvoideae. Nototriche pearcei is often found in the Andes mountain range. It is an endemic species, meaning it is only found in the wild in its native country.
